name: claude-code-litellm
description: LiteLLM budget status in the VS Code status bar

claudeCodeLitellm.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `claude-code-litellm-plugin` binary. If empty, the extension resolves it from `PATH`, then falls back to common install locations (`~/.local/bin`, `/usr/local/bin`).

claudeCodeLitellm.refreshSeconds.markdownDescription: Seconds between status bar refreshes. Minimum 5.
